items.title: ‘The Strangest Sleepover Ever’: Dutch Skeptical as Their Royals Visit Trump
items.summary: The Dutch king and queen are set to stay at the White House on Monday night. At a time of trans-Atlantic tension, the Netherlands isn’t sure how it feels about that.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: SC refuses to junk land-for-rail jobs FIR against Lalu
items.summary: The Supreme Court has refused to quash the FIR against Lalu Prasad in the land-for-jobs case. However, the court granted him exemption from appearing before the trial court and...
